codex_usage_contract.purpose: Generate Stationeers IC10/data-network scripts for controlling machines, sensors, slots, batches, ReferenceIds, and volatile network channels.
generation_rules: Prefer symbolic LogicType names such as On, Open, Setting, Temperature. Use LogicType.Name numeric constants only for dynamic iteration.
Most automation scripts should loop with yield to avoid single-run behavior.
Never assume every device supports On, Open, Setting, or Temperature. Use Stationpedia/device profile data, or guard with bdnvl/bdnvs.
Use aliases for every r? and d? in generated scripts.
Use batch commands for groups and named devices; use pins for installer-configurable scripts.
When controlling a value from sensors, implement hysteresis with two thresholds when possible, not a single noisy threshold.
Use seqz instead of bitwise not when flipping Boolean 0/1 values.
Use ReferenceId after discovering it with batch lbn/lb when one named device must be controlled without consuming a pin.
Use NaN guards for channels and missing batch ReferenceId results.
If a write is optional or uncertain, branch around it with bdnvs device LogicType target.
validation_strategy: Use device profiles only as hints.
Use Stationpedia or page-specific data for exact device fields.
Emit guards for uncertain LogicType support.
Prefer small scripts with aliases and comments only where needed.

instructions.syntax: lbs r? deviceHash slotIndex logicSlotType batchMode
instructions.effect: Batch-load slot LogicSlotType from all matching prefab hash devices.

batch_modes.name: Minimum
batch_modes.use: Lowest value across matching devices. Useful to detect missing ReferenceId with ninf guard.

batch_modes.name: Maximum
batch_modes.use: Highest value across matching devices. Useful for picking a single ReferenceId.

reagent_modes.name: Contents
reagent_modes.use: Current contents in device reagent storage.

special_registers.name: ra
special_registers.purpose: return address for jal and *al branch forms

device_registers.general_rule: Use d0-d5 when installer selects devices with IC housing screws. Use db for the device the IC is inserted into.
device_registers.defensive_rule: Use bdns/bdse to guard missing pins and bdnvl/bdnvs to guard unsupported LogicType load/store before touching optional devices.

addressing.when_to_use: Small reusable controllers configured by screwdriver.
IC Housing self I/O or motherboard/embedded IC on device.
A register or literal stores a device ReferenceId found by lbn/lb or Stationpedia.
Control all devices of one prefab on output network.
Control named groups after labeling devices.
Read/write volatile cable-network Channel0..Channel7 through a specific device connection.

channels.scope: Cable-network connection values accessed as LogicTypes through device:connection syntax.
lost_when: any part of cable network changed, removed, or added
channels.codex_rule: Use channels for transient inter-network messaging, not durable memory. Guard NaN with snan/snanz before using a channel value.

hashing.hashes: Signed 32-bit integers. PrefabHash identifies structure/item prefab; NameHash identifies label text.
discovery: lbn rId HASH("StructureLogicSorter") HASH("Sorter Corn") ReferenceId Maximum

data_network.batch_write_missing: There is no documented sbns instruction; name-filtered slot batch write is not available in the normal instruction set.
data_network.stationpedia_rule: For exact per-device writable/readable LogicType and slot support, Stationpedia is authoritative; this database stores global commands and high-signal common patterns.

device_profile_hints.name: Generic powered machine
device_profile_hints.codex_rule: Do not emit all common fields blindly; verify exact support or guard store/load validity.

device_profile_hints.name: IC Housing
device_profile_hints.codex_rule: Use db Setting as a simple numeric I/O variable between IC and network; db addresses the housing when the chip is mounted there.

device_profile_hints.name: Pipe Heater
device_profile_hints.codex_rule: Use with temperature hysteresis; remember physical device limits still apply.

device_profile_hints.name: Furnace
device_profile_hints.codex_rule: Furnace control is stateful; avoid repeated Activate/Open pulses without branch conditions.

device_profile_hints.name: Logic switch / lever / button / dial
device_profile_hints.codex_rule: Switches are useful as user inputs; buttons pulse Activate; dials expose Setting and Ratio.

device_profile_hints.name: Sensor
device_profile_hints.codex_rule: Treat sensors as read-only unless a specific sensor Stationpedia page says otherwise.

device_profile_hints.name: Logic Sorter
device_profile_hints.codex_rule: For exact sorter logic modes and memory instructions, consult Stationpedia/wiki page before generating stack programs.

device_profile_hints.name: Hydroponics / Harvie pattern
device_profile_hints.codex_rule: Read crop state from tray/hydroponic slots; Plant/Harvest writes are commonly batchable to Harvies.

device_profile_hints.name: Solar tracking pattern
device_profile_hints.codex_rule: Read daylight sensor orientation/activation, then sb Horizontal/Vertical to all target panel prefab hashes.

device_profile_hints.name: Logic Transmitter
device_profile_hints.codex_rule: Use Setting for transmitted values when the transmitter is configured correctly in-game.

device_profile_hints.name: Elevator
device_profile_hints.codex_rule: Use ElevatorLevel for destination commands and guard door/open state separately.
